title: Humanitarian Crisis: Day 6
detail: WHO reports Iranian hospitals overwhelmed. At least 2,800 killed across Iran per ICRC preliminary count. 1.2M displaced from Tehran. Medical supply chains severed. Internet remains down for 95% of population.

title: Russia and China Issue Joint Warning
detail: Putin and Xi issue joint statement condemning 'unprovoked aggression.' Russia moves Black Sea Fleet to eastern Mediterranean. China halts rare earth exports to US. Both threaten 'consequences' but stop short of military commitment.

title: US Launches Second Strike Wave
detail: B-2 bombers from Whiteman AFB and Diego Garcia hit remaining IRGC command centers and missile storage sites. 400+ sorties in 24 hours. Pentagon claims 85% of Iran's ballistic missile capability destroyed. IRGC disputes figures.
